# registry_module_scm_link (Resource)

Links a module to an SCM repository for automatic version publishing via webhooks.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "registry_module_scm_link" "vpc" {
  module_id      = registry_module.vpc.id
  scm_provider_id = registry_scm_provider.github.id
  owner          = "my-org"
  repo           = "terraform-aws-vpc"
  branch         = "main"
  tag_pattern    = "v*"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `branch` (String) Default branch to watch.
- `module_id` (String) UUID of the module to link.
- `owner` (String) Repository owner (organization or user).
- `repo` (String) Repository name.
- `scm_provider_id` (String) UUID of the SCM provider integration.

### Optional

- `tag_pattern` (String) Optional glob pattern for version tags (e.g., 'v*').

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp when the link was created.
- `updated_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp when the link was last updated.
